results.title: The Dump — Your brain dump, organized by AI
results.content:
Features

## Built for how your brain actually works.

🗂

### Smart categorization

Notes land in Business Ideas, Family Admin, Meal Planning, or whatever folders you've set up — without you lifting a finger. AI understands context, not just keywords.

Smart categorization screenshot

🎙️

### Voice, photo, text

Capture any way that's fastest in the moment. Say it, snap it, or type it.

🔍

### Search everything

Find any note across all categories instantly. No tagging required.

📁 [...] 🤖

You want an assistant who files things for you without changing how you capture.

How it works

## Three steps. Zero friction.

1

### Dump it

Voice memo, photo, or text — whatever's in your head. Don't think about where it goes.

2

### AI sorts it

Claude reads the actual meaning of your note and routes it to the right category automatically.

3

### Find it later

Browse by category, search across everything, or filter by type. Your brain, organized.

Features [...] 📁

### Your categories

AI learns your folders and routes notes based on what they actually mean.

✏️

### Edit & refine

Every note is editable. Fix titles, update content, move categories.

## Your best ideas deserve to be remembered.

Free to use. Start dumping in seconds.

Download on iOS   Use on Web →

P.S. The Dump is free to start — no credit card required. Help us build something you'll use forever.

results.title: ZenDump: AI Brain Dump, Smart Task Manager & Productivity Suite - ToolMage
results.content: ZenDump is an innovative AI-powered productivity platform that revolutionizes how individuals and teams manage their thoughts, tasks, and projects. It's engineered to eliminate the friction between having ideas and getting things done, offering a seamless experience from thought capture to organized action. With ZenDump, users can quickly "dump" their brains – speaking or typing any thought, idea, or task without needing structure or formatting. The platform's advanced AI instantly processes [...] The primary advantage of ZenDump lies in its unparalleled speed and AI-driven automation. Users can start being productive in seconds with its 10-second setup and instant brain dump capability, eliminating complex configurations. The AI's ability to automatically organize and prioritize tasks significantly reduces mental overhead, ensuring that important items are never forgotten. Its all-in-one platform consolidates various productivity needs – from notes and tasks to projects and [...] Using ZenDump is designed to be incredibly simple and fast. First, speak or type any thoughts, tasks, or ideas that come to mind directly into the system. There's no need for structure, formatting, or specific commands – just let it all out. The AI then automatically organizes these inputs into relevant categories and smart lists.
